title: Landfall-530: Noble Blood
description: In Landfall-530, centuries after the fall of The Great Dominion, ancient bloodlines and mystical forces shape a bright new world.
body: ![This timeline is over! Check our Discord for more information.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/07267c1ec70c01823632987b7b24cad731a4e8f5.png) ![Landfall-530: Noble Blood](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b4714b14d7c05912189b95566949975c71a7bcd6.png) ---- Fifteen centuries after the fall of [The Great Dominion](https://modrinth.com/modpack/landfall-230-the-great-dominion), the world stands in the shadow of a forgotten empire. The ancient bloodlines, descendants of the legendary figures of Landfall-230, now hold the only connection to that distant past, revered as symbols of power and prestige. In this new era, kingdoms rise and fall, and the influence of the old world just barely lingers. Mystical forces shape the fates of nations, and the gods themselves watch closely, bestowing blessings upon the faithful. Technology, once understood, has become arcane and divine, seen as remnants of an age long gone. As new powers emerge and old legacies fade, the world of Landfall-530 teeters on the edge of a new era, where devotion, ambition, and community will make or break the individual. ---- - For details, read the full [design document](https://drive.google.com/file/d/17MHkyo-WBVAtSASjmKkrkhIyPznikqMA/view?usp=sharing)! - We leverage Palladium to add custom content that supports the canon! Check out [Divine Gifts](https://modrinth.com/mod/divine-gifts)! - This modpack uses the following mods not available on Modrinth: - [WorldEdit](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/worldedit) - [Fakename](https://github.com/Tschipp/fakename) - [Cosmetic Armor Reworked](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cosmetic-armor-reworked) ---- This modpack is intended to be played in a multiplayer environment. Outside of this, some key gameplay features will be inaccessible. Join our Discord to access our tight-knit community!
